name: Yajin Zhou

work.institution: The Chinese University of Hong Kong
work.note: The official homepage places him at CUHK; the ranking page's Zhejiang University affiliation is treated as older information.

tracking.note: Tracked as Qiang Liu's Ph.D. advisor.

sources.note: The homepage says he earned his Ph.D. in Computer Science from North Carolina State University in 2015 under Prof. Xuxian Jiang.
An author bio on his official paper site says he received a bachelor's degree in computer science from Suzhou University, China, in 2003.

summary: CUHK professor and former Zhejiang University ZJU-100 young professor. His homepage says he earned his Ph.D. from North Carolina State University under Xuxian Jiang.

undergraduate.note: An official paper bio on yajin.org says he received a bachelor's degree in computer science from Suzhou University in 2003.

masters.note: Current official sources do not explicitly provide a master's institution.

phd.note: The homepage explicitly says Ph.D. in Computer Science from North Carolina State University in 2015 under Prof. Xuxian Jiang.

postdoc.note: The current official homepage does not explicitly provide postdoctoral history.

name: Yang Zhang

work.note: The official CISPA article and the ranking page both place him at CISPA Helmholtz Center.

tracking.note: Enriched from the imported ranking-page seed using the official CISPA article.

sources.note: The ranking page provides a DBLP author id and a CISPA affiliation for the imported seed.

The official CISPA article says he was a postdoctoral researcher at CISPA under the supervision of Professor Michael Backes and received his Ph.D. from the University of Luxembourg under the supervision of Professor Sjouke Mauw and Professor Jun Pang.
